title: Corpus-Level Statistical Significance for Motif Z-Scores: Recomputation with Adequate Nulls, Mixed-Effects, and BH-FDR Resolution
summary: Demo notebook for corpus-level statistical significance testing of 3-node motif Z-scores across 24 LLM attribution graphs (8 task domains). Demonstrates: isoclass mapping, synthetic graph motif census with null model Z-scores, corpus-level t-test/Wilcoxon/sign test (p=7.1e-15, Cohen's d=3.61), mixed-effects model (ICC=0.587), and biological benchmark comparison showing FFL overrepresentation 3.6-5.4x stronger than biological networks. Uses pre-computed per-graph Z-scores from mini_demo_data.json.
